nasb.text: Then Judah went with Simeon his brother, and they struck the Canaanites living in Zephath, and utterly destroyed it. So the name of the city was called Hormah.

esv.text: And Judah went with Simeon his brother, and they defeated the Canaanites who inhabited Zephath and devoted it to destruction. So the name of the city was called Hormah.

cnv.text: 猶大與他的兄弟西緬同去，擊殺了住在洗法的迦南人，把那城完全毀滅。那城的名字就叫何珥瑪。

ccb.text: 之后，犹大人随西缅人一起攻打洗法城内的迦南人，彻底毁灭了那城。因此那城叫何珥玛。
